result.stdout:
USAGE:
    cognito-oidc [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    client-credentials    Get access token from cognito user pool

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    cognito-oidc [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    client-credentials    Get access token from cognito user pool

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    cognito-oidc client-credentials [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help              Prints help information       
    -d, --domain            Domain of cognito user pool   
    -i, --cognito-id        Cognito id for the request    
    -s, --cognito-secret    Cognito secret for the request
